name: Varg Vikernes - 1992
description:
Tried to make him as accurate as I can, used information mostly from the lords of chaos book and burzum.org.

haven’t tested the bot too much so responses might be quite bad. Please rate the responses using the stars.

Will most likely add more details over time and maybe a new prompt since I suck at writing the initial message.

Edited the bot slightly, added a custom history instead of copying Wikipedia.
